caption: A man wearing a blue long-sleeved shirt is seated at a keyboard in a dimly lit room with dark purple curtains in the background. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and is playing the keyboard with both hands. To his left, an acoustic guitar leans against a stand, and several small plush toys are visible, including one on a stand and another atop a speaker. The text "Head to the next part for more Arpeggios" is displayed across the top of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in place, continuing to play the keyboard and lean slightly toward the microphone. His head tilts downward as he focuses on his hand movements. The lighting and arrangement of equipment, including the keyboard and speakers, remain constant throughout the clip.
